Title: Senior Software Developer
Description: Design and develop enterprise software solutions focused on Python-based ETL and automation systems. Built modular pipelines to modernize legacy processes using SOLID principles, TDD, and design patterns. Lead vulnerability remediation efforts across multiple codebases while supporting production deployments, issue resolution, and continuous improvement initiatives.

Title: Software Engineer
Description: Integrated data pipelines into the core platform to support AI model workflows and analytics dashboards. Applied test-driven development to deliver reliable software under tight MVP timelines, collaborating closely with teammates to ensure successful integration and product readiness.

Title: Software Developer
Description: Modernized the company's core product by migrating a legacy VB.NET desktop system into a .NET 8 Blazor web platform, improving accessibility, usability, and maintainability. Researched and implemented technical solutions that enhanced product capability and competitiveness.

Title: Computer Programmer Analyst
Description: Supported an early-stage startup through planning, requirements gathering, system proposals, and solution design. Helped establish the technical direction and development foundation for future product growth.

Title: Computer Repair Technician
Description: Diagnosed and resolved hardware and software issues across a high-volume repair environment. Performed QA testing, documented repair actions clearly, and delivered reliable technical support with strong customer focus.
